message:
agent: lifecycle events with session_id/turn_index + extension dispatch

Major enhancements to AgentEvent lifecycle events:

AgentEvent field additions:
- AgentStart: now includes session_id
- AgentEnd: now includes session_id
- TurnStart: now includes session_id, turn_index, timestamp
- TurnEnd: now includes session_id, turn_index

This enables extensions and UI components to correlate events across
sessions and track turn sequencing within a conversation.

Extension lifecycle event dispatch:
- Agent now dispatches lifecycle events directly to extensions via
  dispatch_extension_lifecycle_event() method
- Events are dispatched synchronously within the agent loop
- Prevents duplicate dispatch from interactive.rs (which now skips
  AgentStart/AgentEnd/TurnStart/TurnEnd events)

Input event handling in AgentSession:
- run_text and run_with_content now dispatch input events to extensions
- Supports transform and block responses via InputEventOutcome
- New helper methods: dispatch_input_event, split_content_blocks_for_input,
  build_content_blocks_for_input
- Internal refactor: run_agent_with_text and run_agent_with_content
  for post-input-event execution

Startup lifecycle hook:
- Fires "startup" event once extensions are loaded
- Includes version and sessionFile in payload
- Fail-open: extension errors don't block agent startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
